title: Death swap
description: A simple death swap datapack/mod with customizable settings.
body:
In this data pack players try to find a way to kill each other by swapping places with another random player every 3-5 minutes in a random location they are teleported before starting.each player that dies is eliminated until one player is left standing.Noone knows who they're swapping places with

### Information about the game:
|              |                |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| Game Version           | 1.21.5 - 1.21.11 & 26.1             | 
| Player Amount           | 2-8 players             | 
| Game Duration            | Any            |

### The game commands:
| Command           | Function              |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| /trigger deathswap_start            | Starts the game             |
| /trigger deathswap_stop           | Stops the game            |
| /trigger deathswap_settings          | Opens the settings menu            |
